element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns airbike directional control with no vertical mobility constraint
Basic offensive capability paired with movement fundamentals
No enemies repeated across worlds; each world introduces unique enemy designs
Secondary weapon system alongside bullet fire
Depth of movement control added to horizontal navigation
Airbike transforms into all-directional flying ship; dramatically different combat space
Vertical mobility introduced exclusively in boss contexts; significant mechanical shift
Non-combat collection challenge; optional high-score mechanic

typical_relief_triggers: Bonus stage collection (Area 4 of each world)
typical_tension_triggers: Unique enemy designs per world elevate unfamiliarity stress
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Four-phase structure per world creates repeating tension curve: introduction, escalation, boss climax, recovery bonus stage

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Bonus stages (Area 4) serve as optional high-score collection zones distinct from mandatory progression

difficulty_curve.early_game: World 1 introduces horizontal movement, shooting, missiles, and braking with manageable enemy pressure
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Worlds 2-4 escalate enemy variety and boss complexity; no repeated enemy designs force continuous adaptation
difficulty_curve.late_game: Worlds 5-6 peak difficulty with advanced boss designs; culmination of accumulated mechanic mastery
notable_spikes: World 1, Area 3: First boss introduces omnidirectional flight mechanic—significant mechanical shift
World 2+: Each new world adds unique enemy archetypes with no prior exposure

notable_level_patterns.description: Each of six worlds divides into: Area 1-2 (horizontal airbike combat), Area 3 (omnidirectional boss fight with transformed ship), Area 4 (bonus sphere collection)
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All worlds follow this pattern consistently

notable_level_patterns.description: No enemies repeat across different worlds; design forces players to constantly re-evaluate threat patterns and adapt tactics
notable_level_patterns.example_level: World 1 vs World 2 feature entirely distinct enemy types

notable_level_patterns.description: Boss encounters (Area 3) are the exclusive context where omnidirectional movement becomes available; spatial grammar shifts dramatically mid-world
Bonus stages (Area 4) provide respite after boss intensity with non-threatening sphere collection; high-score pursuit is isolated from survival pressure
